minting_now.name: Gift of Time by Manuel Larino
TREND APP NFT V2
minting_now.description:
Imagine being one of the earliest investors in Facebook, TikTok, or Instagram—before the world realized their potential. Now, imagine if your investment wasn’t just a bet on growth but a guaranteed piece of ownership in the company itself.
That’s exactly what the TREND App Inc. NFT Collection offers

minting_now.name: AetherKitsune
minting_now.description:
AetherKitsune – Cyber Anime NFTs by Roxy

Limitierte Collection mit einzigartigen Cyber-Kitsune und Anime Cat Girls/Boys. Neon Vibes, Glitch-Effekte & hochwertiger Anime Style. Von cute bis badass.

Made with love in Germany.

minting_now.name: Greedy v2.1
minting_now.description:
With each passing day, we find ourselves increasingly pressed for time and growing older here, while our plans and destiny always go hand in hand.

minting_now.name: Boardwalk Club
minting_now.description: Boardwalk Club collection has 800 limited edition NFTs. Beach Club has 720 while the rarer Founders Club has 80. Boardwalk Club collection is designed as a digital tool for active participants in the Boardwalk ecosystem.

minting_now.name: MONBIS GENESIS
minting_now.description: Monbis is a 3D digital artwork featuring a three-eyed monster mascot with a minimalist, modern, and toy-like aesthetic. This design is highly suitable for use as an app icon, profile picture (PFP), or character design for collectible toys (blind box toys).

minting_now.name: Apocalypse Badge
minting_now.description: Exclusive Apocalypse badge, available for minting for a limited time.

minting_now.name: 305-02-Compass Points
minting_now.description:
Title: Guidelines 
Definition: A set of principles or direction used to navigate and make decisions in life.
Concept Overview
This collection explores the intricate balance between individuality and connection. It is a visual journey of finding one’s way while resonating with the world around us.
